---
title: "MSDM Website Proposal"
subtitle: "Marketing Portfolio Project"
author: "Ally Henry"
institute: "IBM 6400, Cal Poly Pomona"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    footer: "MSDM Portfolio Proposal"
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    incremental: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    embed-resources: true
---

## Website Vision
This website will serve as my professional marketing portfolio.
- **Goal:** Showcase data-driven projects.
- **Audience:** Potential employers and collaborators.

## The Home Page
The home page will feature:
- A personal statement.
- A professional headshot.
- Quick links to my latest case studies.

## Marketing Projects Slide {.smaller}
This page will function like a blog where I showcase:
1. Data visualizations.
2. Performance metrics.
3. Detailed case studies.

::: {.notes}
Speaker Note: Mention that I plan to update this monthly.
:::

## Technical Components
- **Dashboard:** An interactive R Shiny or Tableau embed.
- **Revealjs:** This very presentation!
- **Analytics:** Google Analytics to track site traffic.

## Contact & Connect
- LinkedIn Profile
- GitHub Repository
- Email Link
---
